channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nehal Hashmi appointed as Sindh Governor, replaces Kamran Tessori
item.description: On Friday, Nehal Hashmi, a senior leader of Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N), officially assumed office as the Governor of Sindh. He replaces Kamran Khan Tessori from MQM-P in this important provi...

item.title: Government launches Economic Stabilisation Fund to manage fiscal shocks from global uncertainties
item.description: On 13th March 2026, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman informed the Lok Sabha that the government has established an Economic Stabilisation Fund amounting to ₹57,381.84 crore. The fund is intended to...

item.title: CCM and UN Envoy Discuss Tanzania’s Commitment to Democratic Governance and Rule of Law
item.description: In Dodoma this week, the ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) reiterated Tanzania’s dedication to upholding democracy, peaceful political participation, and the rule of law. The CCM Secretary-General, Dr ...

item.title: Understanding the challenges and actions of outdoor swimmers in polluted waters
item.description: In the UK, more than 7.5 million people engage in outdoor swimming each year, despite the prevalence of polluted waters. Raw sewage alone was released into UK water bodies for 4.7 million hours in 202...

item.title: US Grants Temporary Authorization for Russian Oil Shipments Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Global oil prices remained above $100 per barrel despite the United States' temporary decision to allow the delivery and sale of Russian oil currently stranded at sea. The US Treasury issued a waiver ...

item.title: Eucharia Anunobi talks about men and financial roles in relationships
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Eucharia Anunobi don spark discussion with her recent comments on money and relationships. For the Honest Bunch podcast, she talk say plenty men dey feel somehow when them de...

item.title: FINEX Supports Marcos’ Plan to Temporarily Suspend Fuel Excise Tax Amid Global Price Shocks
item.description: The Financial Executives Institute of the Philippines (FINEX) has expressed strong support for the legislative proposal that would allow President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. to temporarily suspend or reduce...

item.title: Former respite carer faces court over allegations of child sexual abuse
item.description: Travis Ainsley Muller, a 40-year-old former respite carer, appeared at the ACT Magistrates Court on March 13, 2026, facing multiple charges of sexual abuse involving two children. The alleged offences...

item.title: White House Communications Director Criticizes Stephen Colbert Ahead of Late Show Finale
item.description: White House Communications Director Steven Cheung publicly criticized Stephen Colbert on X, formerly Twitter, following commentary about Colbert's soon-to-end tenure on 'The Late Show.' Cheung shared ...

item.title: Discussion on Cultural Attribution of Jhumka Earrings in Ralph Lauren’s Paris Fashion Week Collection
item.description: During Paris Fashion Week 2026, Ralph Lauren showcased jhumka-style earrings as part of its Polo Ralph Lauren Fall Winter 26-27 women’s collection, labelling them as ‘vintage accessories’. The earring...

item.title: Overcoming Childhood Burns to Build a Life as a Firefighter and Support Others
item.description: At the age of six, the author endured a devastating accident in Hawthorne, Nevada, when a fire caused by kerosene ignited their entire body, resulting in third- and fourth-degree burns over 73% of the...

item.title: Chronic stress from difficult family and social relationships may accelerate biological ageing
item.description: A recent study published in PNAS examined how difficult social relationships, particularly with family members, may influence biological ageing. While supportive friends and relatives promote wellbein...

item.title: Tanzania Advances Women's Land Ownership Rights Through Policy and Digital Services
item.description: Tanzania is making notable progress in supporting women and girls to legally own land, a key step towards gender equality. During a side event at the 70th Session of the Commission on the Status of Wo...

item.title: Pakistan Armed Forces Destroy Terrorist Camps and Infrastructure in Afghanistan Amid Ongoing Operation
item.description: In a significant escalation along the Pak-Afghan border, Pakistan’s armed forces carried out overnight airstrikes targeting terrorist and Afghan Taliban positions inside Afghanistan. Security sources ...

item.title: Kaduna State’s Economic Revival Under Governor Uba Sani
item.description: Kaduna State dey experience better economic growth under the leadership of Governor Uba Sani, as the state don attract over $3.2 billion in foreign investments plus more than N1 trillion domestic capi...

item.title: South Africa flags economic concerns amid Middle East conflict escalation
item.description: Nearly two weeks after coordinated strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran, the conflict is spreading across the Middle East, impacting neighbouring countries, global energy markets, and inter...

item.title: Ex-diplomat stresses India must maintain strategic balance amid US-Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: Former Indian foreign secretary Nirupama Menon Rao has emphasised that India’s response to the ongoing US-Israel military actions on Iran should not be driven by emotions or ideological leanings. She ...

item.title: PRC Announces February 2026 Criminologists Licensure Exam Results
item.description: The Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) has officially released the results of the February 2026 Licensure Examination for Criminologists. Out of 45,936 examinees nationwide, 30,320 successfully ...

item.title: Matt Canavan elected National Party leader, pledges focus on Australian growth and values
item.description: Senator Matt Canavan has been elected the new leader of the National Party following the surprise resignation of David Littleproud. The leadership vote, held during a 45-minute meeting, also saw Victo...

item.title: PM Modi Announces Multi-Billion-Dollar Development Projects Across Indian States Ahead of Elections
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently toured several Indian states, unveiling substantial infrastructure and development investments ahead of upcoming state elections. In Assam, which is under ...
